tr_locative.title: Turkish locative case
tr_locative.fullExplanation: The endings -de and -da often express location and mean 'in', 'at', or 'on'.

tr_present_continuous.title: Turkish present continuous
tr_present_continuous.fullExplanation: The suffix -yor is used to describe actions happening now or around now.

tr_plural.title: Turkish plural suffix
tr_plural.fullExplanation: The suffixes -lar and -ler are used to make nouns plural.
